name: San Marino
excerpt: Geographically the third-smallest state in Europe (after the Holy See and Monaco), San Marino also claims to be the world's oldest republic. According to tradition, it was founded by a Christian stonemason named MARINUS in A.D. 301.

quick_facts.climate: Mediterranean; mild to cool winters; warm, sunny summers
quick_facts.major_exports: washing and bottling machines, other foods, packaged medicine, woodworking machines, aircraft (2023)

summaries.geography_summary: landlocked; an enclave of (completely surrounded by) Italy; smallest independent state in Europe after the Holy See and Monaco; dominated by the Apennine Mountains
summaries.history_summary: Geographically the third-smallest state in Europe (after the Holy See and Monaco), San Marino also claims to be the world's oldest republic. According to tradition, it was founded by a Christian stonemason named MARINUS in A.D. 301. San Marino's foreign policy is aligned with that of the EU, although it is not a member. San Marino is negotiating an Association Agreement that is expected to allow participation in the EU’s internal market and cooperation in other policy areas by late 2024. Social and political trends in the republic track closely with those of its larger neighbor, Italy.
summaries.government_summary: parliamentary republic. Independence: 3 September 301 (traditional founding date)
summaries.economy_summary: high-income, non-EU European economy; surrounded by Italy, which is the dominant importer and exporter; open border to EU and a euro user; strong financial sector; high foreign investments; low taxation; increasingly high and risky debt

suggested_reading: CIA World Factbook data (archived via factbook.json) | https://github.com/factbook/factbook.json

prayer_and_mission.prayer_intro: San Marino's Catholic identity leaves very little room historically for evangelical witness in this tiny microstate. Pray for the clear gospel of salvation by grace through faith alone to reach a nation where Catholic tradition runs largely unchallenged.
prayer_points: Pray for laborers to plant an independent, Bible-believing witness in a nation with virtually no evangelical presence.
Pray for residents practicing inherited Catholic tradition to encounter genuine, personal faith in Christ.
prayer_and_mission.mission_emphasis: San Marino's Catholic identity and tiny population leave very little evangelical presence to build on. Ongoing needs include establishing any autonomous local church at all.
